indicators.note: oversold (RSI 22, %B 0.06) and on funding alone tempting, but regime overrides — oversold can stay oversold in risk_off
RSI 16 near breakdown, price below the lower band -> shrinking tilt; falling knife
RSI 11 <= breakdown 12 (rsi_score 0) -> tilt 0, a breakdown not a fadeable dip
RSI 13 just above breakdown -> rsi_score (50-13)/20 capped, but %B ~0 and risk_off override

computed.regime_reason: fear_greed 21 <= 30 (also breadth 29 <= 40 and median -4.1 < -2) -> risk_off; reversion is overridden by capital preservation
computed.reversion_reason: Everything is oversold, which looks like a reversion buffet — but in risk_off oversold stays oversold (falling knife). The deepest names (CAKE RSI 11, DOGE RSI 9) are below the breakdown threshold 12 so their tilt is 0; the rest are crushed base scores. No name clears min_score_to_enter 0.65, and the risk_off exposure_multiplier 0.15 caps the budget anyway. Capital preservation outranks reversion: the allocator holds full reserve.

entry: No new entries in risk_off: exposure_multiplier 0.15 and no name clears reversion_score 0.65.
Deeply-crushed RSI (<= breakdown 12) is treated as a breakdown, not a dip — tilt 0.
Capital preservation outranks reversion: rotate to the USDT reserve and wait for a range to form.
exit: Exit held risk names: reversion_score below min_score_to_hold 0.50 and regime is risk_off.
Rotate proceeds into USDT via TWAP; honour stop_loss 12% and 2.5x ATR.
Stay flat until the regime upgrades out of risk_off.

actions.reason: regime risk_off; reversion_score 0.42 < min_score_to_hold 0.50; oversold but a falling knife, rotate to reserve
regime risk_off; RSI 11 <= breakdown 12 (tilt 0); the dip became a breakdown
No asset clears min_score_to_enter 0.65 in risk_off; deepest names are below the breakdown threshold; allocator holds full reserve (exposure_multiplier 0.15)
daily-trade requirement satisfied via minimal heartbeat trade (<= 0.10% NAV) while flat

risk_policy.note: In risk_off the strategy refuses to catch a falling knife: the 0.15x multiplier and the breakdown filter leave the book in full reserve regardless of how oversold names look.
